planningOnlyJustification: Product-to-planning pass creates planning maturity artifacts only; runtime implementation remains governed by the full-delivery chain after planning maturity.

certification.notes: Planning artifacts are present. Status remains in_progress because transition guard blocked specs_hardened promotion; no implementation certification is claimed.

executionHistory.summary: Bootstrapped retirement spec from intent-driven architecture review. Defined actors, outcome contract, and 9 BDD scenarios (SCN-066-A01..A09) covering Telegram command catalog reduction, domain_intent.go deletion, annotation keyword-map replacement, and a configurable deprecation window. Hand-off: bubbles.design for design.md, bubbles.ux for /help and BotCommands menu, then bubbles.plan for scopes.md.

Created design.md for legacy keyword and slash surface retirement, including Telegram alias-window architecture, notice persistence, domain_intent.go removal contract, annotation keyword-map replacement, observability, and scenario-to-test mapping. Routed implementation planning to bubbles.plan.

Created scopes.md, scenario-manifest.json, test-plan.json, report.md, and uservalidation.md for legacy command retirement, alias-window handling, natural-language replacements, parser removal, and annotation keyword-map retirement. Artifact lint passed; transition guard blocked specs_hardened promotion due current worktree source edits, unchecked implementation DoD, missing execution evidence, dependency and retro gates, and guard-required plan detail gaps.

Mode metadata reconciliation only. spec.md declares Workflow Mode: full-delivery (authoritative owner intent set 2026-05-31); prior bubbles.plan run defensively wrote workflowMode=product-to-planning, statusCeiling=specs_hardened, planningOnly=true while operating under a planning-only workflow. Reconciled state.json to workflowMode=full-delivery, statusCeiling=done, planningOnly=false; preserved planMaturityOnly=true because planning artifacts are complete and no implementation evidence exists yet. certification.status remains in_progress; no implementation, test, or certification claims made.
